Introduction
    Ta men zai bi ye de qian yi tian bao zha is a TV series starring Chien-Ho Wu, Chia-Yu Chang, and Chun Hong. Chen Hao Yuan is an honor student with a mellow personality. His best friend Hong Cheng Yi, on the other hand, is delinquent...
